CVE-2024-6388.title: Marco Trevisan discovered that the Ubuntu Advantage Desktop Daemo ...
CVE-2024-6388.description: Marco Trevisan discovered that the Ubuntu Advantage Desktop Daemon, before version 1.12, leaks the Pro token to unprivileged users by passing the token as an argument in plaintext.
